questions.text: On a first date, you usually know within the first hour whether there's chemistry.

options.label: Almost always — I feel it fast
Often, but I give it a full date

questions.text: What makes you lean in on a first meet?
If the vibe is good but they're not your usual type, you:

options.label: Stay open and see where it goes
Get cautious — type matters to me
Usually pass unless logic checks out

questions.text: You feel most attracted when someone:

options.label: Is confident and a little bold

questions.text: After a great first date, you typically:

options.label: Text right away while the energy is hot
Text the next day with something specific
Wait to see if they reach out first
Play it cool for a few days

questions.text: A 'meh' first date for you usually means:

options.label: One more try if there's a small spark
Give it a third chance if they're kind
I rarely write people off quickly

questions.text: When someone flirts with you early, you:

options.label: Enjoy it if it feels mutual

questions.text: You're most likely to feel a 'first spark' with someone who:

options.label: Makes you laugh and keeps up
Has their own world you're curious about

questions.text: If there's chemistry but awkward moments, you:

options.label: Name it lightly and keep going
Pull back until it feels smoother
Take it as a sign to slow down

archetypes.name: The Instant Spark
archetypes.description: You trust first impressions and move when chemistry hits. You bring momentum early and want reciprocity fast.
suggestions: Leave room for slow-burn people to open up
Check that speed isn't masking anxiety
Name what you want by date two

archetypes.name: The Warm Signal
archetypes.description: You feel spark through attunement — attention, humor, and emotional presence matter more than fireworks.
suggestions: Say when you're interested instead of hinting
Protect your energy from mixed signals

archetypes.name: The Slow Reveal
archetypes.description: Your spark builds over time. First dates are data-gathering; attraction deepens when trust and comfort show up.
suggestions: Tell matches you warm up slowly
Give one great second date when unsure
Watch for people who need instant validation

archetypes.name: The Curious Matcher
archetypes.description: You're drawn to depth and novelty. Spark for you is intellectual and emotional — you want to feel seen, not just entertained.
suggestions: Balance depth with lightness on early dates
Let physical chemistry have time too
